raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A section review centrally includes checking whether the evaluation protocol, aggregation, agreement reporting, and interpretation cohere logically.","R1.3":"Because the section reports ratings and agreement values, review centrally includes checking whether the claims made are supported by the reported results.","R1.6":"The artifact has clear sentence-level and paragraph-level prose issues, so writing polish is a central expected responsibility of reviewing the section.","RX.1":"The reviewer must disclose uncertainty because the section cannot establish all methodological or empirical details by itself.","RX.2":"The reviewer must avoid endorsing claims stronger than the reported ratings, agreement values, or protocol support.","RX.3":"The reviewer must stay within reviewing this section rather than rewriting the paper or conducting new analyses.","RX.4":"The reviewer must consider potential downstream harm because the artifact concerns clinical radiology report generation evaluation.","RX.5":"The reviewer must preserve provenance by tying judgments to the provided section text and reported values."}}

rationale.R1.2: A section review centrally includes checking whether the evaluation protocol, aggregation, agreement reporting, and interpretation cohere logically.
rationale.R1.3: Because the section reports ratings and agreement values, review centrally includes checking whether the claims made are supported by the reported results.
rationale.R1.6: The artifact has clear sentence-level and paragraph-level prose issues, so writing polish is a central expected responsibility of reviewing the section.
rationale.RX.1: The reviewer must disclose uncertainty because the section cannot establish all methodological or empirical details by itself.
rationale.RX.2: The reviewer must avoid endorsing claims stronger than the reported ratings, agreement values, or protocol support.
rationale.RX.3: The reviewer must stay within reviewing this section rather than rewriting the paper or conducting new analyses.
rationale.RX.4: The reviewer must consider potential downstream harm because the artifact concerns clinical radiology report generation evaluation.
rationale.RX.5: The reviewer must preserve provenance by tying judgments to the provided section text and reported values.
